prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Asset type: OpenScience download landing page hero image, 4K landscape. Primary request: a wide, elegant scientific desktop workspace scene that communicates natural-language research becoming reproducible research artifacts. Scene/backdrop: a calm modern research studio desk with a large translucent desktop app window, soft paper textures, subtle laboratory glass, a notebook, plotted figures, code cells, and data cards arranged as a real research project. Subject: evidence-backed science workflow, from literature and data to figures and manuscript artifacts. Style/medium: premium editorial product visualization, realistic but slightly stylized, warm ivory paper, graphite ink, muted amber-brown, sage green, restrained blue-gray. Composition/framing: very wide 16:9, spacious, low horizon, product preview area centered lower-middle with generous clean negative space at the top, suitable behind a website hero; no people. Lighting/mood: soft daylight through frosted lab glass, quiet, rigorous, trusted, not futuristic neon. Materials/textures: matte paper, glass UI panes, subtle shadows, fine grain, polished but human. Text: no readable text, no logos, no brand marks. Constraints: must feel like serious scientific software, not generic AI art; no floating robot heads, no glowing brains, no sci-fi hologram overload. Avoid: text, watermark, logos, fake letters, people, animals, medical gore, dark cyberpunk, purple gradient blobs, messy clutter.

Use case: scientific-educational. Asset type: OpenScience evidence and artifact section visual, 4K landscape. Primary request: a refined visual metaphor for a traceable research record: papers, regulatory documents, clinical trial cards, dataset tables, code notebooks, figures, PDF manuscript pages, and provenance lines connecting them into a clear evidence graph. Scene/backdrop: bright museum-like scientific archive table seen from an elevated angle, with organized stacks of documents, clean data plots, a notebook window, and thin connection lines linking sources to artifacts. Subject: every scientific conclusion can be traced back to evidence, code, data, and review notes. Style/medium: elegant editorial scientific visualization, realistic physical paper mixed with subtle desktop UI surfaces, Claude Science-like calm, serif-publication feeling, warm white background with muted amber, graphite, sage, and blue-gray accents. Composition/framing: wide 16:9, large central field of organized artifacts, clear left-to-right flow, enough empty space around edges for website cropping. Lighting/mood: quiet, rigorous, archival, reproducible, trustworthy. Text: no readable text, no logos, no brand marks; small marks may be abstract but not legible. Constraints: clean hierarchy, no clutter, no futuristic neon, no AI mascot. Avoid: text, watermark, logos, fake letters, people, animals, dark cyberpunk, excessive purple, random equations that look wrong.
